title: Charge case inside screen/forth screen, left zoom in/out
scenario: Zoom toggle on charge case illustration in Quick Start Guide does not return to original screen when tapping circle button again
steps: Open the Quick Start Guide (QSG) in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Swipe to the fourth screen of the QSG.
Tap the left circle button on the screen.
Observe the zoom behavior and any new text displayed.
Tap the same left circle button again.
expected: Tapping the left circle button zooms in and displays new text. Tapping it again zooms out to the original screen showing the charge case inside.
